text: I wake up at 6:30 every morning and start my day with a glass of water and a short meditation. After a quick breakfast, I leave for work at 8:00. My job keeps me busy until 5:00, with a lunch break around noon. In the evening, I go for a 30-minute run or do some yoga at home. Then I have dinner, watch a show, and read for a while before bed. This routine is simple but consistent, and it helps me feel balanced and productive every day.
